default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI Engineer Summit sponsorship opportunities for Surge AI with GrowthX representatives.](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge AI aims to boost awareness, hiring, and leads through potential sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [AI Engineer Summit offers various sponsorship tiers (Platinum, Gold, Silver) with different benefits](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Content opportunities include keynote presentations, workshops, and leadership track sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Event attracts high-level technical decision-makers and builders, not primarily researchers](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)

## Topics

### Surge AI Background and Goals

  - [Surge AI: Scale AI competitor focused on AI data labeling](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Grew to $1B ARR in 5 years, bootstrapped with 40 employees](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Primary goals:](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
    1.  Awareness
    2.  Hiring
    3.  Leads
  - [Target audience: researchers, builders, frontier labs](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### AI Engineer Summit Overview

  - [Venue: Times Center, New York Times building](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Dates: November 21-22, 2025 (main event), November 23 (workshops)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Attendees: \~300 for leadership track, additional engineering track](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [YouTube channel: 250k subscribers, expecting 300k by event time](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Past video views: 1.5M (Feb Summit), 4.5M (World's Fair)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Sponsorship Packages

  - [Platinum ($150k): 22x12 booth, workshop, booth sessions, content partner status](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Gold ($50k): 10x10 booth, various configurations available](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [Silver: Standard kiosk option](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Additional opportunities: keynote presentation, workshops, leadership track sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Content Opportunities

  - [Keynote presentation slot available (competitive selection process)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Workshop slots (limited availability, may compete with major labs)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Leadership track sponsorship (branding opportunity)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
  - [Professional video content creation for speakers](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)

### Audience and Reach

  - [Primarily builders and technical decision-makers (not researchers)](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [High-level attendees: CTOs, CEOs, founders, AI engineers](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Strong YouTube presence with millions of views on top talks](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to review sponsorship options and content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)
  - [Consider applying for keynote presentation slot](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Follow up via email with any questions or chosen sponsorship package](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=2576.0)
  - [Potentially connect with Swix (content manager) to discuss talk topics if pursuing content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/escpzGq_fTdDUos4xyjAryzyuFNXfone?tab=summary&timestamp=2425.0)

action_items.description: Send sample attendee demographics (companies + job titles) to George
Check availability of after-party sponsorship, inform George
Introduce George to Swix for content discussions re: potential keynote
Review sponsorship options, prepare questions for follow-up with Benjamin
